title: Directory Inventory
subtitle: Directory inventory and folder structure export utility
description: Directory Inventory generates text-based inventories of folders and files.
It can export either a simple file list or a complete folder structure using an easy-to-read tree format.
The tool is designed for documentation, project reviews, inventories, backups, audits, and support requests.
features: Export inventories directly to text files

downloadLinks.title: Directory Inventory
downloadLinks.body: Generate file inventories and folder structure reports from any directory using a simple graphical interface.

howItWorks: Choose either File List or Folder Structure output.
Directory Inventory scans the selected folder and writes the results to the output file.
apiStructure: FrontEnd handles user interaction and application controls.
BackEnd handles directory scanning and report generation.
Supports both file list and folder structure output formats.

commonQuestions.question: What is the difference between File List and Folder Structure?
commonQuestions.answer: File List exports the contents of the selected directory. Folder Structure exports the complete directory hierarchy using a tree format.

commonQuestions.question: Does Directory Inventory modify files?
commonQuestions.answer: No. The application only reads directory information and generates a text report.

commonQuestions.question: Can it scan large directories?
commonQuestions.answer: Yes. Directory Inventory can generate inventories for both small and large directory structures.
